Press Space, Up, or W to jump. Hold Down or S to duck and fast-fall.
Coins increase your score and build combo streaks when collected quickly.
Power-ups give short boosts such as shields, slow motion, double jump, magnet pull, and score multiplier.
Watch for challenge waves. They spawn denser hazards but increase score gain.
Use P or Escape to pause, F11 to toggle fullscreen, and M to mute instantly.
